ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather observation */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the observation was made */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the observation date is a holiday */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the observation day is a working day */,
  "weather" INTEGER /* Weather condition code */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Adjusted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the observation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the observation */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the observation */,
  "dayofweek" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday) */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the observation */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "cloudcover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., Clear, Rain, Snow) */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., weather data, reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data file */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather data file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the weather data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_files_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
